title: America's Top War Unicorn To Begin Combat Drone Production As Next-Gen Startups Challenge Big Defense Primes
summary:
America's Top War Unicorn To Begin Combat Drone Production As Next-Gen Startups Challenge Big Defense Primes

            Weaponized AI, interceptor drones, automated kill chains, ground robots armed with machine guns, humanoid robots, and FPVs equipped with shaped charges all offer a scary preview of what warfare in the 2030s was expected to look like.

Instead, four years of war in Ukraine, followed by the U.S.-Iran conflict, have sharply accelerated that timeline, pulling the future of warfar
summary_ko: 미국의 유니콘 기업이 전투용 드론 생산을 시작했다. 새로운 기술과 스타트업이 방위 산업에 영향을 미치고 있다.

title: Earendil Labs, an AI-powered drugmaker, hauls in $787M
summary: The hefty funding will support a U.S.- and China-based startup that’s amassed a pipeline of nearly 20 drugs and formed two lucrative partnerships with Sanofi.
summary_ko: AI를 활용한 제약 업체 Earendil Labs가 787M 달러의 자금을 확보했습니다. 이 자금은 미국과 중국에 기반을 둔 이 회사의 약물 개발을 지원할 것입니다.

title: Novartis joins Lilly, AZ in China expansion with $480M commitment to boost manufacturing, R&D
summary: Novartis is investing more than 3.3 billion Chinese yuan (roughly $480 million) to soup up its manufacturing facility in Beijing and strengthen its R&D campus in Shanghai, where the company’s China headquarters are also located.
summary_ko: Novartis는 중국에서 제조와 연구 개발을 강화하기 위해 4,800만 달러를 투자했다.

title: Israel, US Strike Gas Facilities In Iran's Isfahan, Possibly Triggering Retaliation Against Gulf
summary:
Israel, US Strike Gas Facilities In Iran's Isfahan, Possibly Triggering Retaliation Against Gulf

	Israel, US strike gas pipeline, distribution station in Iran
	
	
	Trump announces "productive" talks with Iran, "postpones" military strikes for 5 days
	
	
	Iran Foreign Ministry + Parliament speaker say no talks have happened, after Trump said "speaking with a top person in Iran", says will "just keep bombing" if Iran talks fail
	
	
	Trump says Hormuz will be "jointly control
summary_ko: 이스라엘과 미국이 이란의 가스 시설을 공격했다. 이에 대한 보복이 걸프 지역에서 발생할 가능성이 있어 에너지 시장에 긴장이 고조되고 있다.

title: Novartis pays $2B to land a startup’s breast cancer drug
summary: Acquiring a unit of privately held Synnovation Therapeutics hands Novartis a prospect that might improve on medicines that, like its own Piqray, target tumors driven to growth by PIK3CA mutations.
summary_ko: Novartis가 Synnovation Therapeutics의 유방암 약물을 20억 달러에 인수했습니다. 이는 Novartis가 유방암 치료를 개선할 수 있는 기회를 제공할 것입니다.

title: Merck hands over $20M in IBD drug target deal with Flagship's Quotient
summary: Looking to devise new drug targets for inflammatory bowel disease, Merck will pay Flagship Pioneering's Quotient Therapeutics $20 million upfront for access to the biotech’s somatic genomics platform.
summary_ko: Merck가 Quotient Therapeutics와의 협약을 통해 2000만 달러를 지불했습니다. 이는 Merck가 염증성 장 질환 치료를 위한 새로운 약물 타겟을 개발할 수 있는 기회를 제공할 것입니다.

title: Gilead's $2.2B Ouro buyout delivers autoimmune T-cell engager, new purpose for Galapagos
summary: Gilead is paying $1.68 billion for a T-cell engager company via a front-loaded deal that could also give new meaning to its aimless partner Galapagos.
summary_ko: Gilead는 Ouro를 22억 달러에 인수했다. 이는 Galapagos에게 새로운 목적을 제공할 수 있다.
